Class LabelTag

java.lang.Object
javax.servlet.jsp.tagext.TagSupport
org.openxava.web.taglib.LabelTag
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, javax.servlet.jsp.tagext.IterationTag, javax.servlet.jsp.tagext.JspTag, javax.servlet.jsp.tagext.Tag
public class LabelTag extends javax.servlet.jsp.tagext.TagSupport
JSP Tag label to get a translated label with the OpenXava translation mechanism. Typical usage: <xava:label key="depth" />
Author:
Florian Hof
See Also:
